products.name: Gucci-branded Google smart glasses are coming next year

products.name: Ballmer gives $80 million to NPR, with strings attached
products.summary: Connie Ballmer, wife of former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer and co-founder of the Ballmer Group, has given $80 million to NPR. That's roughly seven years' worth of government funding ($11.2m) after Trump and Congress cut funds for public media, but only a fract

products.name: Netflix embraces vertical video with major mobile app update
products.summary: Netflix announced on Thursday that it will be launching a redesigned mobile app, which will include a vertical video feed, at the end of April. "This redesign will better reflect our expanding entertainment offering and make it easier for members to engage how

products.name: Netflix cofounder Reed Hastings is officially leaving the company
products.summary: Netflix cofounder and chairman Reed Hastings plans to leave the company after nearly 30 years. The news comes as part of Netflix's Q1 2026 earnings results released on Thursday, which says Hastings "will not stand for re-election to our Board when his current

products.name: Live Nation says it will fight monopoly suit loss
products.summary: After a jury found that Live Nation-Ticketmaster violated antitrust law on several counts, the company warns in a blog post that the verdict "is not the last word on this matter." The company plans to renew a motion for the judge to issue a ruling against the

products.name: Ozlo’s comfy Sleepbuds are nearly 30 percent off in the run-up to Mother’s Day
products.summary: If you’re struggling to get a full night of rest, a good pair of sleep earbuds can help you tune out unwanted distractions. The Ozlo Sleepbuds are one such option, and they’re currently available for $249 ($100 off) in the run-up to Mother’s Day at Amazon and

products.name: Teenage Engineering might be getting into instrument amps next
products.summary: An unannounced Teenage Engineering device, the KO-Amp 35, can be found over at the FCC in a new filing. The label clearly marks it as a member of the mid-range EP family instruments, which currently includes the KO-II and its spinoffs, the Riddim and the Medie

products.name: The only way to fight deepfakes is by making deepfakes

products.name: Casely has reannounced a power bank recall from 2025 following a fatality
products.summary: Casely first recalled over 429,000 of its 5,000mAh Power Pods wireless power banks in April 2025 following 51 reports of their lithium-ion batteries "overheating, expanding or catching fire," resulting in six minor burn injuries. Both the company and the US Co

products.name: The nine best ways to protect, customize, and accessorize your MacBook Neo
products.summary: The MacBook Neo is poised to be a top-selling laptop in 2026, thanks in large part to its affordable $599 entry price. Despite launching at a more accessible price point than Apple’s $1,099 (though often discounted) 2026 MacBook Air, the Neo makes surprisingly

products.name: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
products.summary: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

products.name: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
products.summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.
